steps.name: review-project-state
steps.description: Aggregate and present project state to researcher.

steps.name: discuss-decisions
steps.description: Structured discussion with researcher on tasks and suggestions.

steps.name: apply-decisions
steps.description: Create new task folders, correction files, and suggestion updates.

steps.name: finalize
steps.description: Write results, step logs, session capture, run verificators, PR, merge.
